_comment: serenity web trainer preset table — transcribed from UI_MAP_2026-07-05 §3 (trainer_ui_apply_model_preset) with the §8 debt FIXED: every row is COMPLETE (run naming per row, no cross-preset leaks); klein workspace corrected to where train_klein_real actually writes; wired=false rows return 501 at launch, honestly.

capabilities.notes: Full optimizer/loss levers; the krea2 driver has no EMA or caption-dropout hooks.

presets.label: Klein 9B
presets._workspace_note: train_klein_real writes to its comptime LORA_DIR/SAMPLE_DIR (alina_train) — displayed path now MATCHES reality (Mojo UI showed a different dir; UI_MAP §8.2)

capabilities.notes: Full levers incl. EMA. 16GB refit (2026-07-22): resident_blocks 0 = zero-pin streamed arm (the anchor-exact arm; the old 9GiB comptime pin OOMs the 5080). Measured 2-step smoke: peak 14.6GB nvidia-smi / 10.3GB driver, ~1.3s/step warm.

presets._resident_note: resident_blocks: bf16 block pin COUNT cap for the streamed_base_opt_in arm (config key, parsed by train_config_reader; -1/absent = comptime 9GiB budget sized for 24GB). 0 = pin nothing (anchor-exact zero-pin arm, fits 16GB: peak 14584MiB). Pinning >0 shifts step-1 loss by GEMM-algo selection (measured 7.6e-3 at cap=2) — keep 0 on this box. Residency changes NO math.

capabilities.notes: P4-landed: optimizer/loss/caption levers being wired now (row encodes the post-P4 truth); EMA not wired — flip if P4 partially lands.
P4-landed: optimizer/loss/caption levers being wired now (row encodes the post-P4 truth); EMA not wired — flip if P4 partially lands.
P4-landed: optimizer/loss/caption levers being wired now (row encodes the post-P4 truth); EMA not wired — flip if P4 partially lands.

capabilities.notes: FROZEN (user mandate 2026-07-04). P4-landed levers; inline sampler is a 128x128 comptime binary — keep sample_every 0. lora_alpha pinned 1.0 (compiled-constant guard; 16.0 could never launch). On-box cache materialized P6-wave1 2026-07-22.

presets._unwired_note: FROZEN by user mandate 2026-07-04 (no sdxl work) — row kept for completeness

presets.label: SD 3.5

capabilities.notes: FROZEN. Inline sampling stripped at launch. P4: optimizer/loss/caption levers being wired now — flip if P4 partially lands.

presets._unwired_note: FROZEN by user mandate — fail-loud route, matches Mojo UI behavior (UI_MAP §8.7)

presets.label: LTX-2 AV

capabilities.notes: Full optimizer/loss/caption levers (flag CLI); EMA unverified in the AV driver — off. Residency rides --resident_blocks, not quantized_resident.

presets._resident_note: resident_blocks: fp8-resident block count emitted as --resident_blocks (16GB refit; the trainer's own non-capture default 42 = ~17GB sized for the 24GB box OOMs on the 5080; measured 2026-07-22). Residency changes NO math.
presets._wired_note: wave 3 (2026-07-22): PRODUCTION train_ltx2_av (mojodiffusion), image512 arm, flag argv shape 'ltx2' (--config carries the merged lever JSON; recipe scalars ride their own flags because ltx2 argv WINS for its fields). NO ltx2_image512_anchor-era eri2 musubi cache exists on this box (that campaign ran on the 3090) — the wired cache is LOCALLY BUILT: real ltx2_cache_512_v2 VAE latents repacked to the musubi-native latents_1x16x16_bfloat16 key + the REAL regenerated Gemma video_context dump as video_prompt_embeds (PRE-connector stage — structurally valid conditioning for the pipeline smoke, NOT the anchor-exact eri2 conditioning; see the cache dir README).

presets.label: Wan2.2 T2V 14B

capabilities.notes: No levers wired yet (legacy-block driver, P4 backlog) — fixed AdamW + MSE; data cache via env.

presets._wired_note: wave 3 (2026-07-22): mojodiffusion training/train_wan22_real (the serenity-trainer copy was a STALE 892-line pre-wan21 snapshot; pixi task repointed). Trainer reads the data cache from env WAN22_DATA_CACHE (measured: the config cache_dir key is parsed but NOT read by any wan arm) — hence the per-preset env map. recipe.cache_dir mirrors the real dir so the merged config stays truthful (the base config's /home/alex/datasets/wan22_cache does not exist). Dual-expert auto-enables via the high-noise ckpt convention (present on disk) — intended.

presets.label: Bernini-R Renderer 14B (12 tasks)

capabilities.notes: Bernini-R 12-task renderer (t2v/i2v/v2v/editing via BERNINI_TASK env). Reuses the wan22-A14B chassis; EMA 0.9999 + caption dropout WIRED; velocity-MSE + inline AdamW (no levers). Device-native path via WAN_DEVNATIVE=1 env. Real dataset via scripts/bernini_r_build_cache.py.

presets._wired_note: 2026-07-23 audit: mojodiffusion train_bernini_r_cond (12-task renderer LoRA, all torch-gated). config_runner shape; binary reads argv[1]=config, BERNINI_TASK from env. Built this session (commits f3a6808..dd4881b).

presets.label: Wan2.1 T2V 1.3B

capabilities.notes: No levers wired yet (legacy-block driver, P4 backlog) — fixed AdamW + MSE; variant/data selection via env.

presets._wired_note: wave 3 (2026-07-22): SAME binary as wan22 — train_wan22_real dispatches the Wan2.1 single-expert arm on env WAN21_MODEL=t2v_1.3b BEFORE the config is read (measured train_wan22_real.mojo:1159; no config key can select it — hence env). WAN21_DIT pins the checkpoint explicitly (it equals the driver's DEFAULT_CKPT_WAN21_1P3B; cfg.checkpoint is NOT consumed on this arm). T2V 1.3B reuses the wan22 t2v 40_woman cache (same Wan2.1-VAE 16ch latent + umt5 text layout).

presets.label: MageFlow Base

capabilities.notes: Loss lever only; optimizer fixed AdamW; data cache via env.

presets._wired_note: wave 3 (2026-07-22): mojodiffusion training/train_mageflow_real. argv contract is [config.json] and the parser reads ONLY argv[1] (extra argv ignored, measured train_mageflow_real.mojo:314-316), so config_runner's [cfg, steps] is tolerated — steps comes from the merged config's max_steps, which the supervisor also uses for its steps argv, so they agree. Data cache is env-only (MAGEFLOW_DATA_CACHE); without it the driver trains on SYNTHETIC data — the env map keeps UI runs on the real 40_woman cache. timestep_shift 6.0 = the Base transformer static_shift.

presets.label: FLUX.1-dev

capabilities.notes: 16GB refit VERIFIED (2026-07-22): streamed_base_opt_in arm fits — 2-step smoke green at peak 12.8GB nvidia-smi (bf16 stack base resident + per-block disk stream; host-OOM fixed earlier via fill_block_store=False). fp8_e4m3 remains VRAM-infeasible on 16GB (~12GiB fp8 blocks + ~6.4GiB stack base) — keep quantized_resident=streamed_base_opt_in.

presets._wired_note: wave 3 (2026-07-22): FLUX.1-dev LoRA live trainer (serenity-trainer train_flux_real, binary built 07-15; FIXED_SIGMA_SMOKE=True comptime — overfit-probe sigma class). checkpoint = REAL FLUX.1-dev (guidance_in present, dl'd 07-16 to /mnt/disk1/models/checkpoints/fluxdev). recipe overrides make the merged config path-resolvable from the supervisor cwd: flux.json's relative models/flux1-dev + serenitymojo/configs paths do NOT resolve from serenity-trainer. cache = the REAL boxjana_flux_512 (22 samples, latent/t5_embed/clip_pool — flux_cache_from_chroma derivation, 07-08 campaign) COPIED back from the retired repo tree (78MB; the live tree lost output/cache in the 07-19 repo swap). quantized_resident streamed_base_opt_in = 16GB refit: fp8_e4m3 pins ~12GiB blocks + ~6.4GiB bf16 stack base > 16GB VRAM; streamed arm holds the stack base + per-block stream. sample_every 0: inline caps sampling not staged (caps preflight fails loud without cap-cache entries).
presets._smoke_blocked_note: RESOLVED 2026-07-22: streamed arm 2-step smoke green on the 5080 (loss 0.42302954->0.4229316, peak 12776MiB, ~6.3s/step warm). The earlier "OOM after loader opened" was the fp8_e4m3 arm of flux_smoke_2step.json (pin_residents_fp8 ~12GiB is the next alloc after that print); that config is now flipped to streamed_base_opt_in.

presets.label: Klein 4B
presets._workspace_note: train_klein4b_real writes to its comptime LORA_DIR/SAMPLE_DIR (klein4b_train) — displayed path MATCHES the driver comptime (klein9b precedent, UI_MAP 8.2)

capabilities.notes: Full levers incl. EMA; resume argv slot not wired in the supervisor for klein4b.

presets._wired_note: wave 3 cont. (2026-07-22): FLUX.2-klein-base-4B via train_klein4b_real (THIN VARIANT of the 9B driver: comptime H 24, klein4b.json dims 3072/5dbl/20sgl/jad7680, post-scrub serenitymojo module names — see driver header). checkpoint = the BFL-format single file flux-2-klein-base-4b.safetensors (dl'd from the HF repo root; the diffusers transformer/ download is split-q/k/v + transformer_blocks.* naming and NOT loadable by models/klein/weights.mojo — header-verified). CACHE: the 9B caches are INCOMPATIBLE (text_embedding [1,512,12288] = Qwen3-8B x layers[8,17,26] vs 4B's 7680 = Qwen3-4B x same layers — header-verified vs klein9b caches); eri2_klein4b_512 is built by pipeline/klein4b_prepare.mojo (Qwen3-4B encoder from the repo's own text_encoder/) over the surviving anchor8 stage. recipe overrides make the merged config path-resolvable from the supervisor cwd (klein4b.json's relative models/* paths do not resolve from serenity-trainer). sample_every 0: no validation_prompts_file staged for 4B; legacy cached-caption sampling stays off.
presets._samples_note: validation_prompts_file: validate_klein_train_config REQUIRES the key (fail-loud, measured). Reuses the klein9b alina samples JSON (prompt text is model-agnostic). Inline caps sampling additionally needs per-prompt cap-cache precache before enabling sample_every>0 on this row.
